verification.detail: Kernel executed on Model/Ascend910B1 3x consecutively, verification passed with atol=1e-2 rtol=1e-2.

notes: Tanh / Padé approximation form: 0.5*x*(1+tanh(sqrt(2/pi)*(x+0.044715*x^3))). Bypasses simulator's noisy float32 asc2.erf (which had ~1.84-4.7 absolute error and forced atol=2.0). Tile width pinned to 64 (one Ascend910B1 SIMD lane); wider tiles only write the first 64 elements. Bit-exact vs np.tanh reference.
